title: 缩略图维护
completionRule: Complete only when the legacy statistics, bounded invalid/empty/expired cleanup and failure reset controls, loading/result/error states, cancellation, active-media stability and deferred chunk boundary have automated evidence. Path-prefix deletion, key normalization and VACUUM must remain explicitly redirected to confirmed offline maintenance instead of being exposed as unsafe online Card mutations.

sourceUiInventory.title: 标题、数据库图标与刷新
acceptanceItems: 缩略图数据库维护标题
右侧 icon-only 刷新按钮
刷新期间 Loader2 旋转状态
所有操作期间禁用重复提交

sourceUiInventory.title: 无效记录与失败记录清理
acceptanceItems: 失败数为零时禁用清除

sourceUiInventory.title: 过期条目清理
acceptanceItems: 保留文件夹缩略图语义
删除数与 cutoff 结果

sourceUiInventory.title: 数据库压缩、路径规范化与说明
acceptanceItems: 各维护动作的紧凑说明文本

items.title: 按需读取有界数据库统计
items.targetContract: An explicitly visible and expanded Card loads one authenticated aggregate snapshot containing total/file/folder rows, Blob/database/WAL/SHM bytes, empty and failed rows, failure reasons and bounded writer status; it never returns database paths or thumbnail keys.
items.notes: XR expands the legacy four summary values with separately labelled file, folder, Blob, sidecar and writer aggregates already owned by the shared maintenance service.

items.title: 有界扫描并清理确认失效路径
items.targetContract: Invalid cleanup scans at most 2000 rows, deletes at most 500 confirmed missing local sources, preserves unavailable-volume rows, reports scanned/deleted/preserved/wrapped counts and refreshes statistics after success.
items.notes: The legacy unbounded command is replaced by explicit scan/delete budgets and unavailable-volume preservation.

items.title: 有界清理空 Blob
items.targetContract: Empty-Blob cleanup requires an authenticated mutation header, deletes at most 1000 rows per request, reports the exact deleted count and reloads aggregate statistics.
items.notes: The Card uses the shared bounded online writer and never opens SQLite directly.

items.title: 清理过期文件缩略图并保留文件夹
items.targetContract: The user chooses 1..3650 days; cleanup always sends preserveFolders=true, deletes at most 1000 rows, reports deleted count and cutoff, and refreshes statistics.
items.notes: Unlike the legacy checkbox, folder preservation is mandatory because folder thumbnails are shared compatibility data.

items.title: 有界清除生成失败记录
items.targetContract: Failure cleanup is disabled at zero failures, requires an authenticated mutation header, clears at most 1000 records, reports the deleted count and reloads statistics without exposing keys or error payloads.
items.notes: Clearing failures permits later demand generation to retry; it does not eagerly regenerate thumbnails.

items.title: 加载、不可用、成功、失败与取消状态
items.targetContract: The Card has one in-flight operation, disables duplicate commands, distinguishes initial loading, unavailable 501, temporary 503, success and sanitized failure states, aborts work on unmount and ignores stale completions.
items.notes: There is no interval polling; refresh is initial-load, explicit-command and explicit-refresh only.

items.title: 沿用唯一 NeoView 兼容数据库与共享 writer
items.targetContract: All Card reads and mutations flow through the shared service and original %APPDATA%/NeoView/thumbnails.db xr-compatible adapter; no Reader tables are added to xiranite.db, no second NeoView database is created and old tables, indexes, metadata.version, user_version and journal settings are untouched.
items.notes: The browser client receives aggregate DTOs only and cannot address database paths or row keys.

items.title: 紧凑控制的名称、范围与状态反馈
items.targetContract: The refresh icon has an accessible name and title, numeric days input has a label and min/max, buttons expose disabled/busy state, and command outcomes use an aria-live status without changing Card geometry unexpectedly.
items.notes: Familiar Lucide icons keep visible labels on destructive commands; only refresh is icon-only.

items.title: 保持旧版信息密度与控件层级
items.targetContract: Preserve the header, compact two-column statistics, invalid/empty/failure group, expiration group, result message and explanatory hierarchy with equivalent Lucide semantics and constrained-sidebar wrapping; intentional omissions are recorded separately.
items.notes: The Card remains a control-panel Card and is default-hidden in XR to prevent an aggregate database scan during ordinary Reader use.

items.title: 零隐藏工作、单飞请求与独立延迟 chunk
items.targetContract: The default-hidden Card performs no work until explicitly docked and expanded, keeps one request in flight, performs no polling, aborts on unmount, does not remount or re-request active media, and remains in an independent deferred chunk under 16 KiB outside entry and ReaderSidebar base chunks.
items.notes: Statistics are cooperative and demand-only; no timer or global store is introduced.

items.title: 高风险数据库动作使用确认式离线替代契约
items.targetContract: Document that legacy path-prefix deletion is not exposed until a reviewed bounded path contract exists, while VACUUM/optimize/backup/restore/key normalization remain confirmed offline CLI operations protected by the shared process lock; the online Card must not reproduce direct Tauri SQLite mutations.
items.notes: This is an intentional safety deviation, not an omitted claim of parity.
